title: Yeison Buitrago
text:
Experiencia profesional
Habi Colombia — Científico de Datos Mid Ago 2025 – Actualidad
Diseño y despliegue de modelos de elasticidad de precios sobre el portafolio de ofertas. Experimentación bayesiana con diseño propio para incrementar margen de contribución. Rediseño de fuentes de datos de precios de referencia para mejorar la propuesta de valor al cliente.
Habi Colombia — Científico de Datos Junior Mar 2024 – Ago 2025
Automatización y despliegue en producción de pipelines con lógica geoespacial en Python y BigQuery (GCP). Modelos predictivos con datos inmobiliarios para originación de crédito bancario. Introducción de experimentos A/B como práctica organizacional.
Frubana Colombia — Especialista en Planificación de Demanda Nov 2022 – Feb 2024
Modelos de pronóstico de demanda sobre miles de SKU en empresa de consumo masivo (Python + SQL). Herramienta interna para analistas de supply chain para detección de comportamientos atípicos.

title: AI-Powered CV Updater
text: Tailoring a CV to each job posting is tedious but important: ATS systems and recruiters prioritize candidates whose profile closely mirrors the keywords in the job description. This manual process can take 30–60 minutes per application.

title: AI-Powered CV Updater
text: Tailoring a CV to each job posting is tedious but important: ATS systems and recruiters prioritize candidates whose profile closely mirrors the keywords in the job description. This manual process can take 30–60 minutes per application.

title: AI-Powered CV Updater
text:
The Solution
A Python tool that:

Reads the job posting (pasted text or URL)
Analyzes the base CV in LaTeX format
Calls an LLM to identify which experiences and skills to highlight
Rewrites the relevant sections of the CV and generates a new .tex file ready to compile

title: AI-Powered CV Updater
text:
Demo

⚠️ Add a GIF or screenshot showing the flow: job input → generated CV.

title: AI-Powered CV Updater
text:
Tech Stack



Component
Technology




Language
Python


LLM



Output format
LaTeX


Interface

title: AI-Powered CV Updater
text:
Architecture
job_posting.txt
       │
       ▼
  [Job parser]  ──→  keywords, required skills
       │
       ▼
  [LLM Prompt]  ──→  instruction + base CV + keywords
       │
       ▼
  [Post-processing]  ──→  replaces sections in the .tex
       │
       ▼
  cv_adapted.tex  ──→  compile with pdflatex

title: AI-Powered CV Updater
text:
Usage Example

⚠️ Add a real example here.

python update_cv.py --job posting.txt --cv base_cv.tex --output adapted_cv.tex

title: AI-Powered CV Updater
text:
Results

⏱️ Adaptation time: from ~45 min to ~30 seconds
✅ Preserves the original LaTeX format and style
🎯 Automatically identifies the most relevant sections for each posting

title: Portafolio – Yeison Buitrago
text:
mi-portafolio/
├── _quarto.yml                        # Configuración del sitio (tema, navbar, etc.)
├── index.qmd                          # Landing page (página de inicio)
├── about.qmd                          # Página "Sobre mí"
├── styles.css                         # Estilos personalizados
├── .nojekyll                          # Necesario para GitHub Pages
├── assets/                            # ← CREA esta carpeta y pon imágenes aquí
│   ├── vis-bogota-preview.png
│   └── cv-updater-preview.png
└── projects/
    ├── index.qmd                      # Lista de proyectos (se genera automáticamente)
    ├── vis-segregacion-bogota.qmd     # Proyecto 1
    └── cv-actualizador-ia.qmd        # Proyecto 2






→ https://quarto.org/docs/get-started/



cd mi-portafolio
quarto render
Esto genera la carpeta docs/ con el HTML del sitio.



git init
git add .
git commit -m "Primer commit: portafolio inicial"
git remote add origin https://github.com/YeisonBL/YeisonBL.github.io
git push -u origin main




Ve a tu repo en GitHub
Settings → Pages
Source: Deploy from a branch
Branch: main / carpeta: /docs
Guarda y espera 1-2 minutos
Tu sitio estará en: https://YeisonBL.github.io






Busca las secciones marcadas con ⚠️ PENDIENTE en los archivos .qmd y reemplázalas con tu contenido real.
Los archivos .qmd son como Markdown normal — puedes escribir texto, pegar código Python con bloques de código, e insertar imágenes.

title: VIS Housing Segregation in Bogotá
text: Social Interest Housing (VIS) aims to guarantee access to decent housing for low-income households in Colombia. However, the concentration of these projects in peripheral areas of Bogotá may reinforce socio-spatial segregation patterns. This analysis quantifies that effect using data from the real estate transaction registry (SNR) and spatial statistical methods.

title: VIS Housing Segregation in Bogotá
text: Social Interest Housing (VIS) aims to guarantee access to decent housing for low-income households in Colombia. However, the concentration of these projects in peripheral areas of Bogotá may reinforce socio-spatial segregation patterns. This analysis quantifies that effect using data from the real estate transaction registry (SNR) and spatial statistical methods.

title: VIS Housing Segregation in Bogotá
text:
Research Question

Does the location of VIS projects in Bogotá amplify socio-spatial segregation, or does it help reduce it?

title: VIS Housing Segregation in Bogotá
text:
Data



Source
Description




SNR
Georeferenced real estate transactions


DANE
Socioeconomic data by UPZ


Catastro Bogotá
Neighborhood and UPZ polygons

title: VIS Housing Segregation in Bogotá
text:
Methodology

Cleaning and georeferencing of SNR transactions with Python (pandas, geopandas)
Segregation indices (dissimilarity index, exposure index)
Spatial analysis — spatial autocorrelation (Moran’s I), heat maps
Visualization — interactive maps with Kepler.gl

title: About
text:
I am a Data Scientist based in Bogotá, Colombia, working at the intersection of statistics, machine learning, and real business problems. Currently at Habi, where I design price elasticity models and A/B experiments for the Colombian real estate market.
I hold a degree in Mathematics from Universidad Distrital FJC (honor roll for four semesters) and am completing a Statistics Specialization at Universidad Nacional de Colombia, where I wrote a preprint on urban segregation in Bogotá.
